headline: UCB’s Bimzelx bests Skyrizi in Phase III PsA study, but analysts sceptical
summary: While this result affirms Bimzelx’s efficacy in PsA, analysts do not believe this readout will have a notable impact on the drug’s uptake or sales.

headline: Why Investors Aren’t Fleeing to Safe-Haven Stocks
summary: When investors fret over geopolitical shocks, they usually rotate into safe havens such as consumer staples and healthcare.  Less obviously, tech and software stocks have also advanced, while traditional safety plays such as healthcare and packaged food have sold off.  By the time hostilities began, those defensive sectors were already crowded—and no longer quite as cheap.

headline: How The Narrative For AbbVie (ABBV) Is Shifting On Immunology Growth And Competition Risks
summary: AbbVie’s model based fair value has been adjusted only slightly, moving from US$248.29 to US$248.86, which keeps the overall price target essentially stable in dollar terms. That small change sits alongside a split analyst view, where some see room for upside tied to immunology growth and pipeline progress, while others focus on competition risk and a more balanced risk and reward trade off at current levels. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving AbbVie...
